mapper.sql: goodsOrderId, openId, userId, goodsId, buyCount, orderType, orderNo, receiveAddrId, shopAddrId, transactionNo, goodsSum, fare, couponMoney, payType, company, realPayment, logisticsNo, logisticsName, status, createdDate, payTime, deliveryTime, finish, tradeTime, imgUrl, messages
mapper.select: select userId, orderNo, transactionNo, payType, status, realPayment from goods_order where orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into goods_order (goodsOrderId, openId, userId, goodsId, buyCount, orderType, orderNo, receiveAddrId, shopAddrId, transactionNo, goodsSum, fare, couponMoney, payType, company, realPayment, logisticsNo, logisticsName, status, createdDate, payTime, deliveryTime, finish, tradeTime, imgUrl, messages ) values (#{goodsOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiveAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shopAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsSum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{fare,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{couponMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{logisticsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logisticsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deliveryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{messages,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into goods_order
goodsOrderId,
openId,
userId,
goodsId,
buyCount,
orderType,
orderNo,
receiveAddrId,
shopAddrId,
transactionNo,
goodsSum,
fare,
couponMoney,
payType,
company,
realPayment,
logisticsNo,
logisticsName,
status,
createdDate,
payTime,
deliveryTime,
finish,
tradeTime,
imgUrl,
messages,
couponId,
receiveName,
receivePhone,
receiveAddr,
#{goodsOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{receiveAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{shopAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsSum,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{fare,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{couponMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{company,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{logisticsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{logisticsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deliveryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{messages,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{couponId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{receiveName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{receivePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{receiveAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update goods_order
openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buyCount = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orderType = #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receiveAddrId = #{receiveAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
shopAddrId = #{shopAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
transactionNo = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goodsSum = #{goodsSum,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
fare = #{fare,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
couponMoney = #{couponMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
payType = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
realPayment = #{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
logisticsNo = #{logisticsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logisticsName = #{logisticsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payTime = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish = #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
tradeTime = #{tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
messages = #{messages,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where goodsOrderId = #{goodsOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update goods_order set openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buyCount = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orderType = #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receiveAddrId = #{receiveAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, shopAddrId = #{shopAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, transactionNo = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goodsSum = #{goodsSum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, fare = #{fare,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, couponMoney = #{couponMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, payType = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, realPayment = #{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, logisticsNo = #{logisticsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logisticsName = #{logisticsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payTime = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deliveryTime = #{deliveryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish = #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, tradeTime = #{tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, messages = #{messages,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where goodsOrderId = #{goodsOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select gor.userId, gor.orderNo, gor.status, gor.buyCount, concat(gor.realPayment,'') as totalPrice, date_format(gor.createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdDate from goods_order gor where gor.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by gor.createdDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from goods_order gor left join order_detail od on od.orderNo = gor.orderNo where gor.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select gor.userId, gor.orderNo, gor.status, gor.buyCount, concat(gor.realPayment, '') as totalPrice, date_format(gor.createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as createdDate from goods_order gor where gor.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and gor.status = #{orderStatus} order by gor.createdDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

select gor.userId, gor.orderNo, gor.goodsId, gor.status, concat(gor.realPayment,'') as realPayment, gor.messages, gor.receiveName as userName, gor.receivePhone as phone, gor.receiveAddr as receiveAddr, concat(gor.fare,'') as fare, concat(gor.goodsSum,'') as goodsSum, concat(gor.couponMoney,'') as couponMoney, date_format(gor.createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdDate, date_format(gor.payTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as payTime, date_format(gor.deliveryTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as deliveryTime, date_format(gor.finish, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as finish from goods_order gor where gor.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and gor.orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update goods_order set openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buyCount = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orderType = #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receiveAddrId = #{receiveAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, shopAddrId = #{shopAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, transactionNo = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goodsSum = #{goodsSum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, fare = #{fare,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, payType = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, realPayment = #{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, logisticsNo = #{logisticsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logisticsName = #{logisticsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payTime = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deliveryTime = #{deliveryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish = #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, tradeTime = #{tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, messages = #{messages,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where orderNo =#{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT userId FROM goods_order WHERE orderNo=#{out_trade_no}

SELECT goodsOrderId, openId, userId, goodsId, buyCount, orderType, orderNo, receiveAddrId, shopAddrId, transactionNo, goodsSum, fare, couponId,couponMoney, payType, company, realPayment, logisticsNo, logisticsName, status, createdDate, payTime, deliveryTime, finish, tradeTime, imgUrl, messages FROM goods_order WHERE orderNo = #{orderNo}
select goodsId from order_detail where orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT goodsOrderId, status, createdDate FROM goods_order WHERE status = 0
select count(*) from goods where goodsId = #{goodsId} and status = 1
